comment: technical index (extra, on top of visit_id)
coverage rate of (non-)open water, in percent
submersive plant infestation (vertical projection), in percent
coverage rate with floating plants (e.g. Lemnoidae, Stratiotes); horizontal surface / percent
coverage rate with floating parts of rooted plants (Nymphaeaceae, e.g. Nymphaea, Nuphar); horizontal surface / percent
horizontal projection of ground-rooted plants which emerge from the water surface
water column coverage rate (percentage) of filamentous
specify which relevant genera are present (e.g. genera from Hydrocharitaceae, Lentibulariaceae, or Lemnoideae)
specification of a floating layer (green algae, blue algae, leaves, ...) in 2m range of the sampling point
Impatiens glandilufera, Elodea canadensis, Lemna minuta, Hydrocotyle ranunculoides, Fallopia japonica, Heracleum mantegazzianum
relevant/influential presence of larger (semi-) aquatic animals including humans; e.g. whether the sample unit is infested with these haggish geese
